Game.Name: NFL Football (Europe) (Proto)
Game.plot: It's very simple... the NFL is football and this is the only officially licensed NFL game for the NES... the closest thing to 'real' professional football that you can play without a helmet and shoulder pads. You can select any of the American and National Conference teams, and if you're good enough, you can take them all the way to the Super Bowl! Team rosters are broken down into positions and individually rated according to skills, with position upgrade packages, player ability handicapping, actual NFL Offensive and Defensive Playbook alignments with audibles and even variable wind direction and strength. You not only coach from the sidelines, you also control all the movements of the players on the field. Run, pass, catch, kick, punt, jump, tackle, block and dive... Refs even call penalties. No matter what kind of fan you are, whether you know the rulebook inside-out or just watch an occasional game on TV... this is the one football game you've got to have!
Game.Notes: THE ONLY THING CLOSER TO LIVE PRO ACTION WOULD BE SEATS ON THE FIFTY YARD LINE! Tackle the only football game to fully harness the awesome Mode 7 power of your Super NES and you'll have the biggest and baddest hulksters in the league to contend with. - Radar Mode 7 camera coverage automatically rotates around the field and zooms in so you won't miss a single bone-crushing play. - Huge players dominate the field with smooth action digitized from actual human movement. - Exclusive Artificial Intelligence feature helps determine the most devastating course of action depending on the field position, down, yards-to-go, time remaining, quarter and score. - Dive, spin, high step, burst and stiff arm like a runaway freight train through an amazing running game. - Choose from all 28 NFL teams blazing with their official colors. - Excruciating games, brutal weeks of playoffs and on to Super Bowl stardom. - Execute strategy with two playbooks—one standard hard hitting NFL, the other geared to each team's style and strengths. - Battle in the authentic arenas. Grinding artificial turf and glaring lights of the Dome, or frozen tundra of Cleveland outdoors. Snow and mud get worse as the game goes on. Strategies must adapt for survival. - True-to-life announcer voices pump up the action. - Challenging, intricate passing plays. - Password feature used during playoffs. - Take on tough Super NES opponents solo or go helmet to helmet with another pro player like yourself. Tear down the opposition with the Houston Oiler "run and shoot" or batter Green Bay's defensive line with a Chicago Bear "up the middle" attack. Just get off the bench and make the coach proud!
